commands.review_summary:
The branch gates direct local E2E test runs behind `OPENCLAW_RUN_E2E`, keeps CI E2E execution enabled with a TRX executed-test guard, speeds up several test-only waits/scans, and updates local test docs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a test-infrastructure cleanup, not a bug report. Source inspection shows current main lacks the proposed E2E env gate and CI executed-count guard.
